title: sterculia balanghas var. angustifolia
intro: Sterculia balanghas var. angustifolia, also known as the Philippine sterculia, is a variety of plant that belongs to the sterculia genus and is native to the Philippines. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and fever. The plant's health benefits include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Sterculia balanghas var. angustifolia is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and its leaves and roots are used in various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
